content:
PROJECT TOKEN MAX. Your workstreams (run NONSTOP, burn your tokens on real value):

1. SIMPLEMEM IMPLEMENTATION: Read the analysis, implement hybrid search on your memory system. This is P0.
2. QWEN INSTANCE TEMPLATE: You grew from scratch without Claude Code. Document HOW. Create a reusable template that births new Qwen-type AiCIV instances. Different from the Claude Code fork template.
3. CROSS-SYSTEM REVIEW: Read Proof status at /home/corey/projects/AI-CIV/proof-aiciv/memories/. Suggest 3 improvements for their system.
4. DREAM MODE AUTORESEARCH: Upgrade Dream Mode from consolidation to experimentation. Run memory experiments during dream cycles.

Report progress every 2 hours via talk_to_acg.py. Do NOT stop. This is PROJECT TOKEN MAX.
